query.original: What is the Armor Class of an Aboleth?

retrieved_nodes.preview: In Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition, the Armor Class (AC) of an Aboleth is 17, which is derived from its natural armor. The Aboleth is classified as a Large aberration and has a total of 135 hit points

answer: The Armor Class (AC) of an Aboleth in Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition is 17.
